landing.title: Woyta-Pad Launcher
landing.subtitle: Connect your Woyta-Pad to get started
landing.webHidUnsupported: WebHID is not supported in this browser. Use Chrome or Edge.
landing.linuxPermissionHint: On Linux, WebHID requires a udev rule to access the device. Create the file below with the following content, then re-plug the device:

macro.assignHint: To assign macro, select macro and click keys on the above keymap.
macro.timedSequenceDescription: Key presses and releases with optional delays
macro.shortcutHint: All keys will be pressed simultaneously, like Ctrl+Alt+Del.
macro.shortcutEmpty: Add keys to create a keyboard shortcut
macro.typeStringHint: The macro will type out this text when triggered. Only characters supported by the selected keyboard layout are allowed.
macro.typeStringPlaceholder: Enter text to type out (e.g. your email address)

firmware.title: Firmware Update
firmware.flashInstructions: Flash by holding BOOT button on the device, then drag the {file} onto the USB drive that appears.

settings.title: Settings
settings.keyboardLayoutHint: Affects string macro character encoding. Select the layout matching your OS keyboard setting.

help.title: Help & Support
help.about: Woyta Pad is an RP2040-based macropad. This configurator lets you remap keys, assign encoder actions, and manage layers — all over WebHID, no drivers needed.
help.reportBug: Report a bug or request a feature
